item.description:
• Use different AI sources for transcription and post-processing, independently
  • Redesigned cloud model picker — browse by provider, then model
  • Post-process with OpenAI, Gemini, or Mistral
  • Filter the Model Library by language
  • Selective backup restore — import only settings, modes, or vocabulary
  • Download progress and cancel for Parakeet and Qwen3 models
  • Fixed memory spike when trimming silence on long recordings
  • More reliable vocabulary replacements (whole-word, literal text)

• New on-device model: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 — fast, private transcription without the internet
  • New cloud options: Microsoft MAI-Transcribe 1.5 and Google Chirp 3 available as HyperWhisper Cloud accuracy tiers
  • Nemotron downloads now resume automatically if interrupted, and queue correctly when multiple are in progress
  • Fixed Quick Capture hotkey not releasing when the feature is disabled
  • Fixed various transcription reliability issues with local models

• New: Gemma 4 12B local AI model
  • Local AI is faster and uses up to 57% less memory
  • New home stats bar shows yearly usage at a glance
  • Redesigned vocabulary input
  • Fixed local AI crashing after every post-processing request
  • Fixed scroll and Sparkle update UI hangs

• New Local API server with MCP support and bearer auth
  • Faster settings and menu bar with less lag
  • Fixed audio recording and launch-at-login issues
  • Removed deprecated Gemini 2.0 Flash models

• Added Gemini 3.5 Flash model option
  • Quick Capture now saves to Apple Notes
  • Added Autocapitalize Insert
  • Fixed app hang on launch and lag when starting recordings

• OpenAI Realtime streaming for faster, live transcription
  • Model Library redesigned with brand marks, live progress gauges, and cleaner key management
  • Remove filler words toggle
  • Bug fixes for audio resume, recording start, and wake-from-sleep device errors

• Added on-device Parakeet real-time streaming transcription
  • Added xAI Grok and AssemblyAI Medical transcription options
  • Improved terminal dictation with floating preview and safer paste
  • Faster cloud startup with better connection recovery

• Fixed post-processing provider resetting when editing custom modes
  • Fixed a crash loop that could make the app unresponsive after failures

• iCloud vocabulary sync — opt-in via Settings, syncs your words across devices
  • Smarter error messages and fewer false alerts
• Improved compatibility with macOS Sonoma and Sequoia
• Fixed local AI post-processing failing to start (Gemma 4)

• Gemma 4 replaces Qwen 3.5 as the built-in local AI model. Requires re-downloading. Use Ollama if you prefer other models
  • New combo push-to-talk modes: FN+Control and FN+Left Option
  • Filler word removal (uh, um, er) now works without post-processing
  • Fixed stop button now transcribes audio instead of discarding it

• Smarter vocabulary matching for Parakeet transcription
  • Fixed rare app hang when checking microphone permissions
  • Fixed recording failures when audio device isn't ready
  • Improved reliability of cloud transcription requests

• New HyperWhisper Cloud post-processing accuracy selector for each mode
  • Added Qwen3 ASR 0.6B local transcription model
  • Fixed app hang and crash on model selection
  • Improved recording stability and threading reliability

• Added Soniox cloud transcription provider
  • Removed Gemma local models — use Qwen instead, or run Gemma via Ollama/LM Studio
  • Fixed error messages showing actual details instead of "No internet connection"
• Fixed Apple Speech local model not appearing on macOS 26 devices

• Apple Speech: new free on-device transcription — requires macOS 26 or later
  • Improved Gemma and Qwen local model reliability and accuracy
  • Fixed post-processing instructions sometimes being ignored
  • Fixed switching modes during active transcription
  • Fixed AssemblyAI transcription errors

• Google Gemini added as a cloud transcription provider
  • Qwen 3.5 local models for on-device post-processing
  • Latest Gemini model options for post-processing
  • Fixed hotkeys not responding on first launch

• Fixed hotkeys not working on first launch
  • Numbers in transcripts now formatted as digits
  • Improved cloud transcription reliability

• Screen Text OCR reads on-screen content for smarter transcription accuracy
  • Redesigned punctuation controls in the mode editor
  • Faster post-processing with optimized prompt caching

• Faster, smoother History view with paging
  • Fixed duplicate transcripts flickering during processing
  • Reduced UI lag when opening or closing recordings
• Added Apple Silicon architecture check for local AI processing

• Improved AI post-processing accuracy with better application context awareness
  • Added auto email formatting in Hyper mode for webmail and email clients
  • Fixed recording start delay by removing 350ms blocking pause
  • Fixed streaming language dropdown showing all languages with incorrect width
  • Fixed status bar incorrectly showing provider on first launch
  • Fixed double-press toggle cancelling the stop flow mid-flight
• Typo fixes

• New status bar in the content area shows local model download and loading state
  • Preset picker polished with clearer provider hints and improved layout
  • Fixed streaming WebSocket failures that could leave the app in a hung state

Performance, Bug Fixes, and Claude Sonnet 4.6
  • Claude Sonnet 4.6 added as a post-processing model option
  • Fixed memory bloat that built up over many transcriptions in a session
  • Copy button now correctly copies the transcription instead of the previously restored clipboard
  • Removed hidden shortcuts that were blocking other apps
  • History text edits are now saved properly when tapping Done

Vocabulary Editing, New Models, and Transcription Tweaks
  • Vocabulary entries can now be edited directly in the settings
  • Gemma 3 12B and 27B added as Gemini post-processing model options
  • New "Remove trailing period" toggle in mode settings
  • Renamed "Append System Prompt" to "Persistent Instructions" for clarity
  • Updated Anthropic model list with latest Claude model IDs

Screen Sharing Fixes
  • Support for repeated dictation into Screen Sharing sessions

Getting Started Progress and Audio Refinements
  • Getting Started section now persists progress and hides upon completion for cleaner interface
  • Audio improvements including normalized sound effects, streaming sounds, and 1-hour max duration limit for streaming sessions
  • Settings view stability improvements with opaque rendering

Sound Effects and Global Localization Expansion
  • Added sound effects toggle for recording start/stop with customizable audio feedback
  • Expanded to 39 languages with new translations for Thai, Vietnamese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, and 30+ other languages
  • Improved transcription accuracy with prompt synchronization across platforms and marker stripping
  • Enhanced mode change toast positioning for better visibility during recording

Enhanced Streaming Support
  • Added support for multiple streaming transcription providers (HyperWhisper Cloud, Deepgram, ElevenLabs)

Clipboard Control and IDE Accessibility Improvements
  • Option to hide transcriptions from clipboard history in Settings → Text Output
  • Recording dialog position now persists across sessions
  • Removed "Developer Mode" preview feature again

Enhanced IDE Support and Audio Improvements
  • Restore application to v2.18.3 with selective re-application of 10 features/fixes from subsequent releases

Simplified and Streamlined Experience
  • Removed Developer Mode preview feature
  • Removed USB foot pedal push-to-talk due to incompatibility issues
  • Enhanced thread safety with improved MainActor isolation

Recording Dialog Positioning and Stability Improvements
  • Persistent recording dialog position remembers window location between sessions
  • Refined prompt formatting for better AI accuracy
  • Critical MainActor refactoring to prevent stack overflow crashes

Fixed Anthropic Provider Issue
  • Fixed Anthropic provider issue for post-processing transcripts

Stability Improvements
  • Added one-time startup migration for legacy language model IDs
  • Refined mode toast visibility and positioning during active recording
  • Enhanced settings state management for improved stability

Stability Improvements
  • Improved mode toast positioning and visibility during active recording
  • Enhanced launch at login reliability using native system integration
  • Critical stability fixes for macOS 26.2 compatibility

Homebrew Support and IDE Compatibility
  • Auto-disable Sparkle updates for Homebrew installations to prevent conflicts
  • Fixed auto-paste for JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ, PyCharm, etc.)

Improved HyperWhisper Cloud & Apple Music Blocker
  • Upgraded to HyperWhisper Cloud v2 with enhanced infrastructure hosted on 17 regions across the globe for lower latency and improved reliability. For corporate networks, whitelist transcribe-prod-v2.hyperwhisper.com
  • Apple Music blocker option prevents unexpected app launches during recording
  • Critical stability fixes for Settings access and MainActor isolation

USB Foot Pedal and Streaming Improvements
  • Add native USB foot pedal support for Push-to-Talk recording control
  • Enhanced clipboard visibility with improved privacy handling
  • Better multi-channel audio processing for diverse input devices
  • Improved text insertion reliability with unified paste approach for streaming input
  • FN key warning messages for better accessibility permission guidance

Streaming Improvements and Localization
  • New "new line" voice command for streaming transcription
  • Added Spanish and Simplified Chinese localizations

Streaming Transcription and Keyboard Improvements
  • Real-time streaming transcription in beta
  • Fixed auto-paste for non-QWERTY keyboards (Dvorak, Colemak, and others)
  • Enhanced paste compatibility with browser address bars and terminals
  • Accuracy tier selection with STT provider routing for cloud transcription

Streaming Status Visibility
  • Added WebSocket connection state visibility for streaming transcription

Streaming Transcription and Keyboard Improvements
  • Real-time streaming transcription in beta
  • Fixed auto-paste for non-QWERTY keyboards (Dvorak, Colemak, and others)
  • Enhanced paste compatibility with browser address bars and terminals
  • Accuracy tier selection with STT provider routing for cloud transcription

Custom Vocabulary for ElevenLabs Scribe v2
  • Add custom terms to improve transcription accuracy for names, acronyms, and jargon
  • Removed experimental Scribe v1 in favor of improved v2 with keyterm prompting

Custom AI Endpoints and Enhanced Error Handling
  • Add custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints (Ollama, LMStudio, OpenRouter) with automatic model discovery
  • Enhanced error notifications with inline toasts and quick access to settings
  • Fix llama-server orphaned processes consuming memory after app termination
  • Fix mode cycling shortcut triggering twice per keypress

Memory Management and AI Improvements
  • Fixed orphaned llama-server processes consuming memory after crashes or force quit
  • Enhanced AI post-processor date format understanding for English variants

License Key Privacy and Device Tracking
  • Transitioned to fair usage license policy
  • Improved license deactivation handling for orphaned activations

Performance Optimizations and UI Fixes
  • Eliminated waveform lag on HistoryView with Core Animation rendering
  • Fixed menu bar shortcut display not updating when toggling shortcuts
  • Reduced minimum clipboard restore delay from 3 to 1 second for finer control
  • Removed local file size limit for transcription with Whisper v3

Video Transcription and File Import Progress
  • Import MP4 and MOV video files with automatic audio extraction
  • Real-time progress popup for file transcription with cancellation support
  • Fixed clipboard setting being ignored when auto-paste fails
  • Fixed Gemma model dropdown not appearing in Local mode

VAD, Better Error Messages, and Improved Audio Handling
  • Voice Activity Detection automatically trims silence to reduce API costs and improve accuracy
  • Error notifications now appear as non-intrusive inline toasts that auto-dismiss
  • Fixed compressed audio imports (M4A, MP3) and empty transcript handling
  • Add Groq as post-processing provider for typo correction

Double-Tap Lock Stability Fix
  • Fixed intermittent "Transcription failed" error when using Fn key double-tap to lock
  • Added 1-second cooldown after locking to prevent key bounce from triggering unlock

File Transcription and Performance Improvements
  • Import and transcribe audio files directly from the top right menu
  • Flexible post-processing - use HyperWhisper Cloud with any transcription provider
  • Performance optimizations to reduce UI lag during focus changes
  • Fixed post-processing language to respect mode settings

Settings Backup and Enhanced Transcription
  • Settings backup and restore - export/import complete app configuration
  • Upgraded to Deepgram Nova-3 with improved accuracy and custom vocabulary support
  • Statistics chart pagination with 30-day display and navigation controls
  • Improved Push to Talk reliability with better double-tap timing
  • Performance optimizations for smoother UI animations

New Provider Support and Enhanced Audio Controls
  • Added Mistral Voxtral Mini and ElevenLabs Scribe v2 transcription providers
  • Introduced Parakeet V2 (English-only) model support with improved language badges
  • Media control dropdown with pause/mute options for system audio during recording
  • Auto-increase microphone volume feature and persistent microphone selection
  • Faster recording startup with improved error handling

Improved Design
  • New Preview Features settings with opt-in Developer Mode toggle
  • Standardized UI headers and improved spacing consistency across all views

Faster API Processing and Optional M4A
  • Increased responsiveness from all API and cloud providers
  • Intelligent WAV fallback conversion when M4A compression fails, ensuring transcription success
  • Settings for automatic WAV to M4A compression after transcription to reduce storage usage

Error Handling and Transcription Improvements
  • Non-activating error toast notifications for improved visibility when app is minimized
  • Retry functionality for failed audio transcriptions with easy recovery
  • Fixed transcript editing textarea
  • Fixed Push to Talk toggle behavior to prevent accidental recording cancellation

Keyboard Shortcut and Settings Improvements
  • Enhanced toggle recording shortcut with state tracking to prevent conflicts with Push to Talk and modifier keys
  • Improved API Keys settings section with cleaner status display
  • Better application window management and restoration

License Activation Improvements
  • Improved license activation process with better error handling

Critical macOS 26.1 Compatibility Update
  • Fixed app crashes on macOS 26.1 (Sequoia) for button handlers

Cancellation Controls and Menu Refinements
  • Immediate transcription cancellation via keyboard shortcut
  • Enhanced Push to Talk reliability with adjusted double-press timing
  • Better Dock visibility management on window close
  • Streamlined menu system for cleaner workflow

Advanced Push to Talk and Model Updates
  • Advanced Push to Talk system with flexible modifier key support (FN, Control, Command, Custom)
  • Double-press locking for continuous hands-free recording
  • GPT-5.1 model support

Developer Mode and Audio Improvements
  • Real-time audio device discovery with automatic microphone detection
  • Transcription error retry button for immediate recovery from failures
  • Audio session management to mute system audio during recording

Stability Improvements
  • Fixed audio engine preparation to run off main thread, preventing UI freezing when starting recordings

Compact UI and Premium Animations
  • Redesigned recording dialog to be smaller and sleeker
  • Provider tracking in history shows which transcription service was used

Audio Reliability Improvements
  • Improved audio conversion reliability with validation, retries, and intelligent fallback mechanisms
  • Fixed stale file path issue in subsequent recordings
  • Enhanced email formatting rules for better AI post-processing results

Enhanced UI and Clipboard Management
  • In-app Recent Updates section showing release history and notes
  • Custom system prompts for AI post-processing modes
  • Normalized keyboard shortcut display with readable labels
  • Major code refactoring for improved stability and maintainability
  • Added support for images to clipboard restoration

Audio Permission Error Improvements
  • Enhanced error logging for audio-related operations
  • Improved microphone permission error detection
  • Prevented unnecessary crash reports for expected permission-related scenarios
